name: Advantage Solutions Inc.
summary: Our Company We provide outsourced sales, marketing, merchandising, sampling, and retailer support services to consumer packaged goods (CPG) manufacturers and retailers primarily across North America. Our services are designed to support distribution, retail execution, shopper engagement, and private brand development across both physical and digital commerce environments. We serve more than 4,000 clients across grocery, mass, club, retail pharmacy, convenience, and other channels in over 100,000...
